title: Cookie policy
seoDescription: Multilingual cookie policy template pending legal review.
intro: This cookie policy must be aligned with the cookies that are actually active on the future website before publication.

sections.heading: Cookies actually in use
body: Document only technical, analytics or third-party cookies that really exist in production.
Do not automatically inherit text from the previous site without checking active scripts and services.

sections.heading: Consent and management
body: If non-essential cookies are enabled, there must be a prior and granular consent system.
The previous audit detected a cookie banner and an inherited policy, but it did not confirm active Analytics in the reviewed HTML sample.

pendingReviewNote: Pending full legal review before publication.
